name: kb-wiki-vnext
description: KB/Wiki vNext thin-memory harness for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Thin session memory and governed .kb-next flows for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Guides Codex through KB/Wiki vNext session-start, targeted lookup, semantic hygiene, governed proposals, wiki draft review, and fallback without loading the full KB by default.
defaultPrompt: Use the KB/Wiki vNext vnext-session-start plugin command when it is exposed; in PowerShell/PATH shells run python core\versions\kb-wiki-vnext\runtime\kb_next.py session-start --json instead.
Use KB/Wiki vNext existing/new project setup commands for deployment.
Use KB/Wiki vNext targeted lookup before opening broad memory.
Run read-only python .kb/kb.py hygiene-audit --json before HOT overflow proposal flows.
Review a .kb-next proposal without mutating .kb directly.
